---
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Find project root and make src/ importable
# ------------------------------------------------------------
PROJECT_DIR = Path.cwd()

while not (PROJECT_DIR / "src").exists() and PROJECT_DIR != PROJECT_DIR.parent:
    PROJECT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR.parent

if not (PROJECT_DIR / "src").exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError("Could not find project root containing src/ folder.")

sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_DIR))

import yaml
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from IPython.display import display, HTML

from src.map_utils import (
    add_metric_layer,
    make_base_map,
)

DOMAIN = "economic-food"

CLEAN_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "clean" / "economic-food.csv"
GEOGRAPHY_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "raw" / "Geography" / "cb3_2020_census_tracts.geojson"
METADATA_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / "docs" / "metric_metadata.yml"


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Page-level CSS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
display(
    HTML(
        """
        <style>
        h1.title {
            display: none;
        }

        .quarto-title-block {
            display: none;
        }

        .cell-output-stdout {
            display: none;
        }

        .leaflet-top.leaflet-left {
            left: auto !important;
            right: 10px !important;
        }

        .leaflet-top.leaflet-left .leaflet-control {
            margin-left: 0 !important;
            margin-right: 10px !important;
        }

        .leaflet-control-layers {
            display: none;
        }

        .economic-food-map-title {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-top: 24px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        </style>
        """
    )
)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load clean economic/food data
# ------------------------------------------------------------
clean = pd.read_csv(CLEAN_PATH, dtype={"GEOID": str})
clean["GEOID"] = clean["GEOID"].astype(str).str.zfill(11)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load CB3 tract geography
# ------------------------------------------------------------
tracts = gpd.read_file(GEOGRAPHY_PATH)
tracts.columns = tracts.columns.str.strip()

if "GEOID" not in tracts.columns:
    if "geoid" in tracts.columns:
        tracts = tracts.rename(columns={"geoid": "GEOID"})
    else:
        raise ValueError("Could not find GEOID/geoid column in CB3 geography file.")

tracts["GEOID"] = tracts["GEOID"].astype(str).str.zfill(11)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join clean metrics to geography
# ------------------------------------------------------------
tracts = tracts.merge(
    clean,
    on="GEOID",
    how="left",
    validate="one_to_one",
)

assert len(tracts) == 31, f"Expected 31 CB3 tracts, got {len(tracts)}"
assert tracts["GEOID"].is_unique, "GEOID is not unique after merge."


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load metric metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
with open(METADATA_PATH) as f:
    all_metrics = yaml.safe_load(f)

metric_specs = {
    var: meta
    for var, meta in all_metrics.items()
    if meta.get("domain") == DOMAIN
}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Select economic/food metrics to map
# ------------------------------------------------------------
preferred_metrics = [
    "poverty_rate_pct",
    "food_supply_gap_rank",
    "food_supply_gap_score",
]

metrics_to_map = [
    metric
    for metric in preferred_metrics
    if metric in metric_specs
    and metric in tracts.columns
    and not tracts[metric].isna().all()
]

if not metrics_to_map:
    raise ValueError(
        "No economic-food metrics found to map. Check docs/metric_metadata.yml "
        "and data/clean/economic-food.csv."
    )


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create one separate map per metric
# ------------------------------------------------------------
for metric in metrics_to_map:
    meta = metric_specs[metric]

    display(
        HTML(
            f"""
            <div class="economic-food-map-title">
                {meta["label"]}
            </div>
            """
        )
    )

    spec = {
        "dimension": meta["short_label"],
        "label": meta["label"],
        "unit": meta["unit"],
        "palette": meta["palette"],
    }

    for optional_key in ["positive_values_only", "zero_color", "zero_label"]:
        if optional_key in meta:
            spec[optional_key] = meta[optional_key]

    m = make_base_map(tracts)

    add_metric_layer(
        m,
        tracts,
        metric,
        spec,
        show=True,
        overlay=False,
    )

    display(m)
```
